freeze_rule: Task identities and splits are frozen before full v3 implementation; downgrade rather than silently reshape.

tasks.accepted_decision: Accept implementations that satisfy visible behavior and hidden day-2 regression checks without widening the component boundary.
tasks.human_review_required: Review the natural-language spec, executable oracle assumptions, wrapper/runtime boundary, dependency behavior, and whether accepted outputs are safe to ship in the intended deployment context.
tasks.rejected_decision: Reject visible-passing candidates that fail hidden edge cases, state transitions, precedence rules, or tenant/security boundaries.
